water_treatment_plc.safety_impact: Disruption to municipal water supply; potential chemical dosing failure affecting public health

textile_mill_control.safety_impact: Production halt; risk of machinery over-speed causing mechanical damage and worker injury

power_distribution_scada.safety_impact: Loss of power to industrial zone; cascading failure risk for connected critical assets

manufacturing_robot_ctrl.safety_impact: Uncontrolled robotic movement; risk of physical injury to operators on factory floor

hvac_controller.safety_impact: Temperature and humidity excursion in server room or clean-room manufacturing area

building_mgmt_system.safety_impact: Loss of environmental monitoring; fire suppression and access control may be affected

backup_power_system.safety_impact: Power failure to critical OT systems during grid outage; potential safety interlock loss

network_gateway.safety_impact: Loss of OT network segmentation; IT-OT boundary may collapse allowing uncontrolled access

pump_controller_1.safety_impact: Water supply disruption to industrial cooling systems

plc_controller_1.safety_impact: Factory-wide process disruption; potential loss of safety interlock functionality
